text: RLHF (Ouyang et al. 2022, OpenAI) fine-tunes LLMs using human preference feedback to align outputs with human values, training a reward model from comparisons and optimizing the policy via PPO. This is how InstructGPT/ChatGPT were built.

DPO (Rafailov et al. 2023, Stanford) simplifies alignment by directly optimizing a preference-based objective without training a separate reward model, achieving comparable results to RLHF with greater stability.

Constitutional AI (Anthropic 2022) enables self-alignment by having the model critique and revise its own outputs based on predefined principles, reducing human annotation cost while improving harmlessness.
